items.definition_en: A goal is when the ball goes into the net.
items.example_en: The team scored a goal in the last minute.

items.definition_en: A player is someone who takes part in a game.
items.example_en: Each player wears a numbered shirt.

items.definition_en: A team is a group of people who play together.
items.example_en: Our team won the match yesterday.

items.definition_en: A ball is a round object used in football.
items.example_en: He kicked the ball across the field.

items.definition_en: A referee is the person who makes sure players follow the rules.
items.example_en: The referee blew the whistle to start the game.

items.definition_en: A stadium is a large place where people watch sports.
items.example_en: The stadium was full of cheering fans.

items.definition_en: A match is a game between two teams.
items.example_en: We watched the football match on TV.

items.definition_en: A coach is the person who trains the team.
items.example_en: The coach gave the team a pep talk.

items.definition_en: A goalkeeper is the player who stops the ball from entering the goal.
items.example_en: The goalkeeper made a great save.

items.definition_en: A fan is a person who likes and supports a team.
items.example_en: Every fan wore the team’s colors.

items.definition_en: A pitch is the field where football is played.
items.example_en: They ran across the pitch to celebrate.

items.definition_en: A defender is a player who tries to stop the other team from scoring.
items.example_en: The defender blocked the shot.

items.definition_en: A forward is a player who tries to score goals.
items.example_en: The forward scored two goals in the first half.

items.definition_en: A midfielder is a player who plays in the middle of the pitch.
items.example_en: The midfielder passed the ball to the forward.

items.definition_en: A whistle is a small tool used to make a loud sound.
items.example_en: The referee blew the whistle at half time.

items.definition_en: A substitute is a player who replaces another player.
items.example_en: The substitute came onto the pitch after the break.

items.definition_en: A captain is the leader of a team.
items.example_en: The captain lifted the trophy after the match.

items.definition_en: A kick is when you hit the ball with your foot.
items.example_en: His kick sent the ball into the net.

items.definition_en: The score shows how many goals each team has.
items.example_en: The score was still 0 0 at half time.

items.definition_en: A corner kick is when the ball is kicked from the corner of the field.
items.example_en: The team won a corner kick.
